reason: Current test/validation model used by Kimari. Proven on GTX 1060 6GB.
notes: Smallest practical model for testing. 228 tok/s prompt / 73 tok/s generation on GTX 1060 CUDA.

reason: Good small instruct model. Apache 2.0 license.
notes: Qwen2.5 series, strong for its size. Fits any GPU with 2GB+ VRAM.

reason: Lightweight model from HuggingFace. Apache 2.0 license.
notes: SmolLM2 is designed for efficiency. Good candidate for low-end hardware.

reason: Popular Llama model, smallest variant. Llama 3.2 Community license.
notes: Llama 3.2 1B. Good baseline. Check license terms before commercial use.

reason: Popular Llama model, 3B variant. Fits 6GB VRAM. Llama 3.2 Community license.
notes: Llama 3.2 3B. Fits GTX 1060 6GB at Q4_K_M. Check license terms before commercial use.
